title: Israel Prepares to Prosecute First Suspects in Oct. 7 Attack Led by Hamas
summary_full: Parliament passed a new law that paves the way for military trials for hundreds of Palestinians suspected of taking part in the 2023 attack that ignited the two-year war in Gaza.
summary_public: Parliament passed a new law that paves the way for military trials for hundreds of Palestinians suspected of taking part in the 2023 attack that ignited the two-year war in Gaza.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Prosecute First Suspects in Oct. 7 Attack Led by Hamas
